description:
Goal:
Plan and add moderate-difficulty brokers only after T-007 is stable.

Candidates:
- Whitepages
- PeopleFinders
- Radaris
- MyLife

Acceptance:
- Each broker has a separate scoped ticket before implementation.
- CAPTCHA-heavy or hostile flows become manual_required.
- No broad 'support all brokers' patch.
title: Add Tier-2 broker expansion plan
